message:
fix(bubbletea): add graceful shutdown for external forwarder thread

The external message forwarder thread could block indefinitely on recv()
during program shutdown, preventing clean thread joins. This adds
cooperative shutdown via an AtomicBool flag.

Changes:
- Add `external_shutdown` AtomicBool shared between run loop and forwarder
- Replace blocking recv() with recv_timeout() polling every 50ms
- Check shutdown flag on each poll iteration
- Set flag before dropping sender to signal threads to exit

This ensures the forwarder thread responds to shutdown requests within
50ms instead of potentially hanging forever. Works in conjunction with
the existing thread join logic (bd-3azk, bd-3dmx).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
